## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between GrowthXLabs and Litebox Strategies to discuss branding and website design progress.](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Positive feedback on the new logo direction with the "X" symbol formed by connected lines](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Suggestion to explore customizing the typography to better integrate with the symbol](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Discussion around extending the logo/branding elements into iconography, illustrations, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Consideration of incorporating video demos/tutorials on the website](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Need to start working on website content and structure](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

## Topics

### Logo Iteration

  - [New logo concept with "X" symbol as an exponent, using connected lines from brand design](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Aims to make the logo more dynamic and allow for potential animation](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Overall positive feedback, seen as more impactful and unique](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Suggestion to customize the typography to better connect with the symbol shape/style](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)

### Brand Element Extensions

  - [Exploring how the logo symbol and line elements could extend into iconography, illustrations](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Tying into existing brand shapes, colors, grid layouts](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Creating unexpected/eye-catching elements while maintaining cohesion](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1205.0)

### Video Content

  - [Client interest in video tutorials/demos to showcase the product](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Potential to incorporate video on the website](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [Videos of Marcel demoing have been effective for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

### Website Content & Structure

  - [Need to start working on website content and overall structure](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Marcel to provide a draft of the homepage content/flow](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [This will allow design team to start mocking up the pages](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Iterate further on the logo, exploring typography customizations](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Develop brand extensions like iconography, illustrations using logo elements](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Outline video content strategy and scripts](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Marcel to provide draft website content/structure, prioritizing homepage](https://fathom.video/share/mRokpKRgwjs-QX6iDj4zowdz6PruUR7f?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
